title: Cocktail Lab Assistant
description:
Jigger & Pony Group is a leading hospitality company that owns and operates restaurants and bars in Singapore. A pioneer in Singapore’s cocktail bar scene, the Group’s portfolio comprises of six cocktail bars and two restaurants.

Cocktail Bars:

  • Jigger & Pony (No. 9 The World’s 50 Best Bars 2025, No. 3 Asia’s 50 Best Bars 2025)
  • Gibson – Timeless cocktail bar balancing balances ingredient‑driven creativity with classics
  • Live Twice – Cocktail bar inspired by mid-century modern Japan
  • Pop City - Japanese-lifestyle cocktail bar in Singapore’s Central Business District
  • Cosmo Pony - Convivial bar with a cosmopolitan soul in Jakarta
  • BOP - Korean cocktail dining bar in Tanjong Pagar

Restaurants:

  • Humpback – oyster bar and seafood bistro with a focused wine & cocktail list
  • Caffe Fernet – Modern Italian restaurant bar with a view of the Marina Bay waterfront


Jigger & Pony Cocktail Lab

Serves as the group’s central production hub, supporting our outlets through the preparation of pre-batched cocktails and large-volume accompaniments. The Lab ensures consistency, efficiency, and quality across all venues by handling advance preparations, allowing our bar teams to focus on service, execution, and guest experience. It plays a key role in maintaining standards and supporting smooth daily operations across the group.

Role Overview:

The Lab Assistant is responsible for daily preparation and production of high-quality ingredients and pre-mixed cocktails used across our beverage programs. This role supports day-to-day tasks, ensuring that mise en place and cocktail ingredients are prepared efficiently and according to standards. This position is ideal for individuals with a keen interest in mixology, food science, or culinary arts, and is an opportunity to be part of an innovative and collaborative environment that bridges bar craft with kitchen precision.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Assist in the preparation of ingredients, following recipes and procedures.
  • Operate basic lab equipment under supervision (e.g., blending, infusion, carbonation).
  • Maintain cleanliness and organization within the lab.
  • Label and store products correctly.
  • Ensure all lab equipment is properly maintained, functioning safely, and operated according to protocols.
  • Conduct regular quality checks on products to ensure consistency in flavor and presentation.
  • Collaborate with other departments (e.g., guest shifts, R&D) for special projects and product innovation.

Requirements:

  • Prior experience in a culinary or beverage production setting is advantageous
  • Attention to detail
  • Willingness to learn and take direction
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, production-oriented environment with changing priorities.
  • Ability to follow through and meet its deadlines and achieve its goals
  • Pastry trainees may apply

postedCompany.description:
JIGGER & PONY PTE. LTD.

Jigger & Pony (Facebook.com/JiggerandPony) has been voted as Singapore’s Best Bar by industry peers and is led by Aki Eguchi, voted Singapore’s Best Bartender. Starting in 2012, Jigger & Pony family is a fast-growing hospitality group with 5 F&B concepts Jigger & Pony / Sugarhall / Humpback / The Flagship / Gibson operating in Singapore. The first namesake concept, Jigger & Pony, has cemented its reputation as one of Asia’s best craft cocktail bar and gained a reputation for outstanding hospitality.

Jigger & Pony, Sugarhall and Gibson has just been voted as one of Asia's 50 Best Bars for 2 years in a row.
